design_philosophy: Layered darkness with high-contrast, technical precision. We deliberately avoid the ubiquitous 'purple-blue AI gradient' and instead use deep void black combined with sharp, energetic Vibrant Coral accents. The interface feels like a high-end camera or professional NLE (Non-Linear Editor) interface: pure function, exposing the tools while the vibrant generated 4K media remains the undisputed hero. It must scream 'professional-grade' yet remain fully accessible.

surfaces_and_materials.marketing_hero: Glassmorphism overlays (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40) over dynamic AI images. Never use flat pure black if an image is beneath it.
surfaces_and_materials.workspace_panels: Grid Borders ('Technical Look'). 1px solid #27272A. Flat backgrounds. Zero drop shadows. Use inner borders to define sections (border-r, border-b).
surfaces_and_materials.buttons: Primary CTA uses Vibrant Coral. Ghost buttons use border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-md).
surfaces_and_materials.inputs: Flat fill (#0A0A0B), 1px stroke (#27272A), crisp focus rings (ring-1 ring-[#FF4D4D]).
surfaces_and_materials.animations: Snappy micro-interactions for tools (0.15s ease-out). Smooth fade-ins for generated images.

layout.marketing: Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical bento layouts for feature showcase (Image-to-Video, Text-to-Video). Massive spacing (py-24, gap-8) to let the platform breathe.
layout.workspace: Mode B (Control Room). Strict, dense layout. Sidebar (w-64) + Main Canvas (flex-1) + Properties Panel (w-80). tight spacing (gap-4). 100% viewport height (h-screen) with no jagged bottoms.

component_guidelines.generation_canvas: Checkerboard dark pattern or pure #050505 to make the 4K image pop. Use flex centering for output media.
component_guidelines.prompt_input: Floating command-palette style at the bottom of the canvas, heavily blurred background, glowing subtle border. Add a subtle inner shadow.
component_guidelines.history_gallery: Masonry or dense grid layout for past generations, hover states reveal download/animate actions in an overlay.
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='generate-video-button', data-testid='prompt-input').

hero_background.description: Abstract red fluid waves used as a dramatic, high-end texture behind the hero section.

editor_texture.description: Smooth black and blue fluid artwork for empty states or deep UI backgrounds.

generation_sample_1.description: High-quality 4K landscape showcasing the text-to-image capabilities.

user_avatar.description: Creator portrait for user profile or testimonial sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the app in a dark theme exclusively, avoiding standard SaaS generic templates.
Do not use generic purple/blue AI gradients. Stick to the void black (#0A0A0B) and Vibrant Coral (#FF4D4D) accent.
Implement the Workspace as a 'Control Room' taking up full 100vh, ensuring tools and canvas have precise borders and density.
Marketing landing page must use heavy padding, bento grids, and the hero image overlaid with max bg-black/50.
Integrate Shadcn components (Dialog, Slider for duration, Select for style) but strip away soft radii—make them sharp (rounded-md max).
Ensure the text-to-video / image-to-video feature forms have a dense, technical UI.
Apply data-testid to every button, input, and interactive tab.
Use standard React .js files and styling (no .tsx required per environment).
